overrides.expect: \int_ {\widetilde {\gamma}} \omega = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \int_ {\gamma} \omega & \text {if \widetilde {\gamma} is a forward reparametrization}, \\ - \int_ {\gamma} \omega & \text {if \widetilde {\gamma} is a backward reparametrization}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \int_{\widetilde{\gamma}} \omega = \left\{ \begin{array}{ll} \int_{\gamma} \omega & \text{if } \widetilde{\gamma} \text{ is a forward reparametrization}, \\ -\int_{\gamma} \omega & \text{if } \widetilde{\gamma} \text{ is a backward reparametrization}. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: \delta_ {J} ^ {I} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \operatorname{sgn} \sigma & \text { if   neither   I   nor   J   has   a   repeated   index   and   J   =   I_{\sigma }   for   some   \sigma\in S_{k}}, \\ 0 & \text { if   I   or   J   has   a   repeated   index   or   J   is   not   a   permutation   of   I }. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \delta_{J}^{I} = \left\{ \begin{array}{ll} \operatorname{sgn} \sigma & \text{if neither } I \text{ nor } J \text{ has a repeated index and } J = I_{\sigma} \text{ for some } \sigma\in S_{k}, \\ 0 & \text{if } I \text{ or } J \text{ has a repeated index or } J \text{ is not a permutation of } I. \end{array} \right.
